description.en-US: Bishop and martyr (c. 200–258). Pastoral letters on the unity of the Church, the lapsed, the duties of the bishop — and his own martyrdom under Valerian.

body.en-US: Bishop and martyr (c. 200–258). Pastoral letters on the unity of the Church, the lapsed, the duties of the bishop — and his own martyrdom under Valerian.
4 works in the canonical 19th-century English translations (ANF / NPNF, ed. Roberts & Donaldson / Schaff & Wace), sourced from the New Advent archive.
